ddls:
CREATE TABLE "log_data" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag associated with the log data */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value recorded in the log */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value recorded in the log */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value recorded in the log */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the data collection in seconds */,
  "min_minute" INTEGER /* Minimum minute recorded in the log */,
  "max_minute" INTEGER /* Maximum minute recorded in the log */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the data is valid */,
  "is_end_point" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether this is an end point log */,
  "read_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the log has been read */,
  "datetime_obj" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "datetime_str" TEXT /* String representation of the datetime */,
  "raw_attributes" TEXT /* Raw attributes of the log entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source associated with the log entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the log entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the log entry */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification time of the log entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the log entry */,
  "alert_trigger" INTEGER /* Indicator of if this log entry triggered an alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_data_tag_name FOREIGN KEY ("tag_name") REFERENCES log_tags ("tag_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., sensor, log file) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the last maintenance was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "threshold_low" REAL /* Lower threshold for the metric */,
  "threshold_high" REAL /* Upper threshold for the metric */,
  "alert_threshold" INTEGER /* Indicator of if the metric has an alert threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source associated with the tag */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_tags_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_tags_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the log */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device) used to access the log */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES log_data ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES log_data ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry the report is based on */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES log_data ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry the maintenance is based on */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES log_data ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
